heading: Availability of appropriations for transportation
label: 329 Availability of appropriations for transportation
text: Appropriations for carrying out this chapter shall also be available for the transportation of any eligible person and necessary attendants to or from a hospital (including any hospital of a State or political subdivision to which an eligible person is released under ), to the place where a relative to whom any person is released under resides, or to a person’s home upon his discharge from hospitalization under this chapter.section 323 of this titlesection 323 of this title
